text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has been training late into the
evenings in preparation for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one such occasion, she encounters Ines Fujin,
who is also still practicing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines vows to grab Ryan's attention, as Ryan is
focused solely on beating Mejiro McQueen in
their next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, Mejiro Ryan begins to feel anxious
about competing against her friend.
